titleStmt.title: SII 9.576: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 576. (A.R. No. 99 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD TO THE WEST OF THE MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT KAMBADURU, KALYANADRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1458, Durmukhi, Jyēshṭha, ba. 30, Ādivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1536 June 18, Sunday, in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Baiyapa-Nāyaka confirmed the grant formerly made of the 6 villages, Jālavaṭi, Hosahaḷḷi, Ammakere, Tegegala, Gāḍidipāṟa and Baṇḍēnahaḷḷi, and certain wet fields at Kambhadūru for the service of the god Mallikārjunadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁga
ḷu 1458 neya durmukhisaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha ba 30 Ādivāradalu śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīacyu
tarāyamahārāyaru sukhāsīnarāgi pruthvīrājyan
geIutamviralu baiyapanāyakaAyyanava
rige nāyakatanake saluva kuṁdurupeya sīmeyo
ḷagaṇa kaṁbhadūra sthaḷadalū kaṁbhadūra mallikārjuna
dēvarige Aṁgaraṁgavayibhōga nayivēdyadīpārādhane palakisēve rathōtsa
vaka prāku saluva grāmagaḷa vivara jālavaṭiya grāma 1 hosahaḷi grā 1
Ammakere grāma 1 tegegala grāma 1 gāḍidipāṟa grāma 1 baṁ
ḍēnehaḷi grāma 1 Aṁtu grāma 6 kaṁbhadūra keṟe keḷage sa
luva gade kha 3 gaṁ hūvina kāluve dēvanīlabhaṭara ho
la Oṁdū rāmadēvara gade khaṁ . 0 hola khaṁ . 0 Ø kāsīmaṭada mā
nya 1 khaṁ . IU modalāda Ēnuṁṭāda grāmavanū bayappa
nāyakaAyanavara nirūpadiṁda Ekāṁbradēvarigū sarvamā
nyavāgi biṭukoṭu śāśanavanu barasi koṭeU �yo grāmagaḷige
Āvanobanu kāṇike kaṁdāya mēlugāṇike Ārobarū A
pēkṣisidavanu vāraṇāsiyali mātāpitrugaḷa vadhisida pā
takakke hōdavaru Eṁdu Abhimānavastuvāgi dēvarige koṭa
du Eṁdu barasida silā
śāśana .
Digital edition of SII 9.576 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
